doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains legally incorrect information regarding eviction procedures and uses an invalid future effective date, while falsely attributing this guidance to HUD.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: The document provides dangerously inaccurate legal advice that contradicts Illinois law (which requires a court-ordered eviction process) and uses an impossible future date for its effective period.
